title: rubus × gothicus var. lidforssii
intro: Rubus × gothicus var. lidforssii, also known as the European black raspberry or Black raspberry, is a hybrid of the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus laciniatus). The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its high anthocyanin content, which has been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × gothicus var. lidforssii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially helping to prevent certain types of cancer. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and jams, and is also consumed fresh or frozen in its raw form.
